name: india-telecom-plans-scraper
title: India Telecom Plans Scraper - Jio, Airtel, Vi & BSNL
description: Collect public prepaid plans from Jio, Airtel, Vi, and BSNL, including price, validity, data, calls, SMS, network type, OTT benefits, circle, and recharge URLs.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the run starts to cover browser startup and operator page setup. Number of events depends on memory (one per GB, minimum one).

plan-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean telecom plan saved to the dataset.
